# Federico Morgante

> Project Manager & Full Stack Developer based in Florence, Italy. Over 14 years of leadership experience — from coordinating industrial teams for Leonardo S.p.A., the Italian Navy and Fincantieri, to leading customer care departments in enterprise software. Currently Customer Care Manager at RCP-vision (180+ enterprise clients) and freelance Team Lead at FAM Vision.

Federico Morgante bridges business strategy and technical execution. His leadership journey started in 2006 (hospitality, hotel management, Italian Senate's Honor Company) and matured through six years as welding department manager, delivering the missile compartment of the Italian Navy's latest frigate for Leonardo S.p.A., as well as components for submarines and Fincantieri cruise ships. In 2023 he pivoted to tech with an intensive Full Stack Developer program at EPICODE, joining RCP-vision first as a developer and today leading their entire Customer Care department while building enterprise web applications in freelance with FAM Vision.

## Contact

- [Email](mailto:federicomorgante88@gmail.com): federicomorgante88@gmail.com
- [GitHub](https://github.com/MultiFedez): @MultiFedez
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/federico-morgante/): @federico-morgante

## Role in FAM Vision

- **Project Manager / Responsabile di Progetto** — capo-progetto on client engagements, coordinates development team and client-facing delivery
- **Full Stack Developer** — Angular + Spring Boot delivery on enterprise engagements

## Skills

**Leadership & Project Management:** Team Leadership (14+ years, up to 12 people), Stakeholder Management, Project Coordination, Budget Management, Agile & Scrum, Cross-Functional Teams, Sales & Marketing Coordination

**Languages:** JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, SQL

**Frontend:** Angular, HTML5, CSS3, SASS, Bootstrap

**Backend:** Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, Postman

**CRM & Tools:** HubSpot, ZenDesk, Jira, Trello

**Workflow:** Mobile-First Responsive Design, Cross Browser Testing & Debugging, Agile Development & Scrum

## Experience — Management & Leadership (14+ years, 2006 — Present)

- **Customer Care Manager at RCP-vision** (Aug 2025 - Present): Leading the entire Customer Care department of an enterprise software house. Direct management of 180+ enterprise clients across the software lifecycle. Coordination of the Customer Care team plus sales and marketing departments. Decision-making authority on product feedback loops and feature prioritization.
- **Welding Department Manager — Industrial Contractor** (2017 - 2023, 6 years): Managed a 12-person welding department delivering manufacturing projects for the largest Italian industrial groups. End clients: Leonardo S.p.A. (missile compartment of the Italian Navy's latest frigate, including surface cannon movement system and internal robotic missile loading/unloading mechanism), Italian Navy (submarine components), Fincantieri (cruise ship components), plus classified aerospace projects under confidentiality. Supply chain, shifts, commissions, deadlines and direct liaison with clients' technical referents.
- **Honor Company Soldier — Italian Senate & Chamber of Deputies, Rome** (2011 - 2012): Italian Air Force Honor Company at the Italian Parliament. Coordination of subordinate airmen during institutional ceremonies.
- **Manager & Internal Administrator at Hotel Morgan** (2008 - 2011, 3 years): End-to-end management and internal administration. Accounting, operations and online booking software systems.
- **Shift Manager at Naxos Caffè** (2006 - 2008, 2 years): First leadership role. Coordination of a 9-person team, cash operations, supplies and expense control.

## Experience — Tech (2023 — Present)

- **Customer Care Support at RCP-vision** (Dec 2024 - Aug 2025): Technical support role leveraging the deep knowledge of the enterprise software previously developed as Full Stack Developer.
- **Full Stack Developer at RCP-vision** (Dec 2023 - Dec 2024): Enterprise software development with Angular + Spring Boot + PostgreSQL. Agile/Scrum cross-functional collaboration.
- **Full-Stack Developer & Team Lead at FAM Vision (Freelance)** (Aug 2023 - Present): Co-founding member and team lead of a web agency delivering enterprise web applications, SaaS platforms and corporate websites across Italy. Technical lead of 3 developers, client-facing role, project management across multiple concurrent engagements.

## Education

- **Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science for Digital Business** - Università Pegaso (2024 - Present)
- **Project Manager Course** - Castro Academy (In Progress): PMP Certification · Agile & Scrum · Stakeholder & Budget Management
- **Full-Stack Developer Course** - Epicode School (2023)
- **High School Diploma - Scientific Program** (2002 - 2007)

## Certifications

- HubSpot Customer Service Certified
- HubSpot Sales Certified
- Full-Stack Developer Certified
- Front-End Developer Certified
- Back-End Developer Certified

## Featured Projects

- [Football Match Analytics](https://football-match-analytics.web.app/): Enterprise SaaS platform for advanced football analytics with AI, 10 ML models analyzing 35,000+ matches - Angular 17 SSR, Firebase, Google Cloud, Motion
- [CERNET ESCO](https://cernet-esco.it/): Corporate multipage website for energy management software and ESCO services - Angular 16, Firebase, Bootstrap, Iubenda
- [Semplicemente Comunità - User Platform](https://app.semplicementecomunita.it/): Complete web platform for managing Renewable Energy Communities (CER) with Stripe payments and OpenStreetMap - Angular 16, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, AWS
- [Semplicemente Comunità - Admin Dashboard](https://admin.semplicementecomunita.it/): Advanced administrative dashboard for CER operations with real-time analytics and role-based access - Angular 16, Spring Boot, Chart.js, PostgreSQL, AWS
- [Semplicemente Comunità - Corporate](https://semplicementecomunita.it/): Corporate website presenting CERNET management software for Energy Communities - Angular 16, Firebase, Bootstrap, OpenStreetMap
- [Adriano Group](https://adrianogroup.it/): SEO-optimized landing page for furniture installation services with Trustpilot integration - Angular 16, Firebase, Motion, Swiper.js
- [Info Salute](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kSOgRkFmkWI): Personal project web app for health information based on patient testimonies - Angular, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL
